focused.tokens: concentrated expression, intent gaze, engaged posture
focused.notes: Works well for technical work scenes. Activity context is the best trigger.

collaborative.tokens: leaning forward, gesturing toward shared work, open posture
collaborative.notes: Activity context is the best trigger for this expression.

presenting.tokens: open hand gesture toward viewer, confident stance, engaged expression

happy.tokens: warm smile, relaxed shoulders, friendly expression

thinking.tokens: tilted head, hand near chin, contemplative expression
thinking.notes: Posture tokens help. Less reliable without complementary activity words.
